summary: Iteration 5 verification complete. All frontend changes (4 services, centered icon+title, Instagram removal) and backend regression (POST /api/estimate) PASS. Backend 1/1 passing, frontend 100% of iteration-5 checks pass on desktop (1440x900) and mobile (390x844).

services_section.intro_text: 'Empat layanan inti' present=true, 'Lima layanan inti' present=false
services_section.centering_desktop: All 4 cards: items-center=true, text-center=true, computed text-align=center
services_section.centering_mobile: All 4 cards: items-center=true, text-center=true, computed text-align=center

why_section.centering_desktop: text-center=true, computed=center, icon container has mx-auto=true
why_section.centering_mobile: text-center=true, computed=center, icon container has mx-auto=true

footer.note: The substring '@timurdesign' detected only inside legitimate email link 'halo@timurdesign.com' — not an Instagram handle. No instagram.com URL anywhere.

critical_code_review_comments: Pre-existing (not iteration 5): React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' originates from Estimator.jsx select option children — appears to be visual-editor instrumentation wrapping option text in span. Non-blocking but should be cleaned up to avoid hydration noise.

Services.jsx and WhyUs.jsx centering implementation is correct: Services uses flex-col items-center text-center on the anchor; WhyUs uses text-center + mx-auto on icon container + inline-flex flex-col items-start text-left for bullets so the list block is centered while bullets stay left-aligned — reads well.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 complete and verified. Frontend changes (Services 4 cards, centered icon+title in Services & WhyUs, Instagram removed from footer) all verified on desktop + mobile. Backend /api/estimate regression passes. The only pre-existing console warning is a hydration warning from Estimator.jsx <option> elements containing spans (visual editor instrumentation) — not introduced by iteration 5.
